channel.title: International Journal of Emerging Electric Power Systems
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in International Journal of Emerging Electric Power Systems

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Ehsanul Haque Peerzadah, Rehana Perveen, Abdul Hamid Bhat DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijeeps-2024-frontmatter6

item.title: California’s electric grid nexus with the environment
item.description: Article by Ehsanul Haque Peerzadah, Rehana Perveen, Abdul Hamid Bhat DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijeeps-2023-0117

item.title: Adaptive centralized energy management algorithm for islanded bipolar DC microgrid
item.description: Article by Ehsanul Haque Peerzadah, Rehana Perveen, Abdul Hamid Bhat DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijeeps-2023-0077

item.title: Distributed new energy information acquisition model of distribution network based on Beidou communication
item.description: Article by Ehsanul Haque Peerzadah, Rehana Perveen, Abdul Hamid Bhat DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijeeps-2023-0070

item.title: A single phase modified Y-source inverter with high voltage gains and reduced switch stresses
item.description: Article by Ehsanul Haque Peerzadah, Rehana Perveen, Abdul Hamid Bhat DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijeeps-2023-0194

item.title: Technical assessment of power interface to utilize untapped power of decentralized solar pumps for positive impact in livelihoods
item.description: Article by Ehsanul Haque Peerzadah, Rehana Perveen, Abdul Hamid Bhat DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijeeps-2023-0201

item.title: An improved method for monitoring the junction temperature of 1200V / 50A IGBT modules used in power conversion systems
item.description: Article by Ehsanul Haque Peerzadah, Rehana Perveen, Abdul Hamid Bhat DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijeeps-2023-0142

item.title: Stochastic uncertainty management in electricity markets with high renewable energy penetration
item.description: Article by Ehsanul Haque Peerzadah, Rehana Perveen, Abdul Hamid Bhat DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijeeps-2023-0102

item.title: Power quality disturbances classification using autoencoder and radial basis function neural network
item.description: Article by Ehsanul Haque Peerzadah, Rehana Perveen, Abdul Hamid Bhat DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijeeps-2023-0143

item.title: Use of waste activated carbon and wood ash mixture as an electrical grounding enhancement material
item.description: Article by Ehsanul Haque Peerzadah, Rehana Perveen, Abdul Hamid Bhat DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijeeps-2023-0120

item.title: Double-layer optimal energy management of smart grid incorporating P2P energy trading with smart traction system
item.description: Article by Ehsanul Haque Peerzadah, Rehana Perveen, Abdul Hamid Bhat DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijeeps-2023-0160

item.title: Performance analysis of SRFT based D-STATCOM for power quality improvement in distribution system under different loading conditions
item.description: Article by Ehsanul Haque Peerzadah, Rehana Perveen, Abdul Hamid Bhat DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijeeps-2023-0107

item.title: Power quality improvement of utility-distribution system using reduced-switch DSTATCOM in grid-tied solar-PV system based on modified SRF strategy
item.description: Article by Ehsanul Haque Peerzadah, Rehana Perveen, Abdul Hamid Bhat DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijeeps-2023-0161
